name: Fresh Vegetable Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 1 cup red onion cut in chunks lengthwise
1/2 medium red bell pepper cut into 1-inch pieces
2 cups bok choy thinly sliced, or cabbage
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine broth, cornstarch, soy sauce, and sugar; mix well.
2. Set aside.
3. Heat oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat until hot.
4. Add gingerroot, garlic, carrots, celery, onion, and bell pepper; cook and stir for 6 to 8 minutes or until crisp-tender.
5. Add bok choy (cabbage) and cornstarch mixture; cook and stir for 1 minute or until sauce is thickened and bubbly.
